overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through Night City's neon-drenched urban environment at night. The clip progresses from an open plaza featuring a distinctive V-logo megabuilding through intensely purple-lit pedestrian zones and into a dense urban canyon of towering skyscrapers with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with futuristic transit station and V-logo megabuilding

agents.ego_description: following an NPC pedestrian through the wet plaza toward the illuminated V megabuilding

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player toward the V megabuilding

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with distinctive orange V logo and large digital billboards
covered walkway structure with illuminated interior running parallel to the plaza
tall structural columns with vertical rainbow neon lighting
large illuminated advertisement screen on the megabuilding facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a spacious urban plaza at night, with the camera following an NPC toward a massive V-logo megabuilding. Rainbow-lit pillars line the left side while a covered transit station runs along the right, with wet pavement reflecting the ambient neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge with intense purple neon illumination and parked vehicles

events.description: lighting shifts to intense magenta and purple neon emanating from the building facade on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past parked vehicles while vibrant purple neon reflects off the wet pavement

entered.detail: building exterior bathed in intense magenta and purple neon light with horizontal light strips
futuristic cars parked along the plaza edge including a beige sedan and red vehicle

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the edge of the plaza where intense purple neon from a building facade dominates the left side. The camera passes parked futuristic vehicles while the V megabuilding shifts to the right background, and the wet ground mirrors the vivid magenta lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: main avenue with skyscraper canyon walls and moving traffic

events.description: turns left from the plaza onto a main avenue flanked by towering skyscrapers
vehicles pass by on the right side of the avenue

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of a busy avenue between towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving down the avenue

entered.detail: tall building facade featuring a grid of rainbow-colored illuminated panels
tall futuristic buildings creating an urban canyon effect on both sides of the avenue
tall blue poles with horizontal neon light bars

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a main avenue enclosed by towering skyscraper walls, entering an urban canyon. A building with a colorful rainbow grid facade stands on the left while traffic moves along the right, and the sidewalk stretches forward between the massive structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with continuous neon signage and covered walkways

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue sidewalk passing other pedestrians in the deep urban canyon

entered.detail: concrete staircase with overhead covering and blue accent lighting
cluster of large digital advertisement screens and neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues deeper into the urban canyon, with concrete stairs and covered walkways on the left and dense neon billboards illuminating the right. The avenue stretches ahead between the towering structures, with pedestrians sharing the sidewalk and the wet pavement reflecting the surrounding lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban plaza that gradually narrows into a dense, towering skyscraper canyon. It begins by following an NPC across a spacious plaza toward a massive V-logo megabuilding, passing rainbow-lit pillars and a covered transit station over wet, reflective pavement. As the camera reaches the edge of the plaza, the lighting shifts to an intense magenta glow from a building facade on the left, passing parked futuristic vehicles while the megabuilding recedes into the background. The scene then turns onto a main avenue, transitioning into an urban canyon enclosed by massive walls and a colorful rainbow grid facade. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this architectural corridor, moving past concrete stairs and covered walkways toward a horizon of dense neon billboards and pedestrians.
